app.subtitle: Listen to the service in your language, at church or while watching our live stream on YouTube. Tap a language when it is live.

languageSelector.inactiveBody: Translation is only available during the live stream (at church or when watching our YouTube live stream). If you need translation enabled for an event or have questions, open «Schedule & contact» and tap «Technical support».
languageSelector.hint: Green = live. Red = not broadcasting. Translation runs only during the stream.
languageSelector.a11yHintAvailable: Double tap to listen in this language
languageSelector.a11yHintUnavailable: Translation is only available during the live stream. Use Schedule & contact to request support.

permissions.audioMessage: This app needs audio access to receive the live stream.

alerts.permissionsRequiredBody: The app needs audio access. Please enable permissions in settings.
alerts.connectionErrorBody: Could not connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
alerts.genericErrorBody: Could not start the stream. Please try again.

foregroundService.channelDescription: Keeps the stream active in the background

churchInfo.welcome:
Welcome to the live stream with simultaneous translation from Romanian Pentecostal Church EBEN-EZER Castellón de la Plana.

Service schedule:
churchInfo.headphonesNote: If you need headphones or adapters, contact the sound team. Thank you for joining us!
churchInfo.addressLine: Camí de la Donació, 89, 12004, Castellón de la Plana
churchInfo.whatsappPrefillMessage: Hello, I would like information about the live stream.
